I'm now fully immersed in solidifying the configuration strategy. I'm focusing on cleaning up secrets by storing the hardcoded values as *defaults* within the environment variable lookups. I'm now revising the configuration defaults to align with the latest guidance. I'll restructure `constants.ts` (or `env.ts`) to exclusively rely on `process.env` for all variables. I'm now implementing the fully consolidated configuration strategy. I'm focusing on creating an exported `CONFIG` object in `constants.ts` to manage `process.env` calls. entries.description: Implement safe environment variable access to prevent ReferenceErrors in browser environments where 'process' may be undefined.
Ensure Supabase client initialization does not throw if environment variables are missing, by using valid placeholder strings.
Add error boundaries for local storage parsing to prevent corrupt data from crashing the application.
